title: Nostalgic Reality (BTVR)
body:
# BTVR/NR
### Nostalgic Reality, aka Better Than VR
VR mod for BTA

## Requirements
- [Babric for BTA 7.1a](https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo/releases/tag/v7.1-pre1a)
- [Halplibe](https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/bta-halplibe/releases/tag/3.4.1)

## Info

NR is not a port of vivecraft, it is it's own thing.

NR currently has
- some gestures (swinging your arm to do actions; attacking, digging, using foods)
- GUIs
- controls

Some future plans:
- menu world navigation
- teleportation mechanics
- a menu for some less important but still useful actions
- gesture based switching of hotbar slots
- vr keyboard

![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04f897bfd45646db6606c4cadfb0d38925a50249.png)
